topics.label: Scratch Editor
topics.description: Open scratch.mit.edu and explore the editor — stage, sprites, and block palette.

topics.label: Motion & Looks
topics.description: Move sprites, change costumes, say/think bubbles. Visual feedback.

topics.label: Events
topics.description: When green flag clicked, when key pressed, when sprite clicked. Event-driven programming.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: If/else, repeat, forever, wait. Visual loops and conditionals.

topics.label: Variables & Lists
topics.description: Create variables and lists to store data. Counters, scores, and collections.

topics.label: Operators & Sensing
topics.description: Math operators, string operations, and sensing (touching, distance, mouse position).

topics.label: Custom Blocks (My Blocks)
topics.description: Create reusable block definitions. Scratch's version of functions.

topics.label: Clones & Broadcasting
topics.description: Clone sprites for multiple instances, broadcast messages between sprites.
